content.problemStatement:
You are given integers N,M,KN, M, KN,M,K and NNN integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.

You can perform the following operation at most KKK times:


Choose any integer xxx such that 0≤x<2M0 \le x < 2^M0≤x<2M. Then, for each 1≤i≤N1 \le i \le N1≤i≤N, you can replace AiA_iAi​ with Ai⊕xA_i \oplus xAi​⊕x, or leave it unchanged.
What is the maximum value of A1+A2+…+ANA_1 + A_2 + \ldots + A_NA1​+A2​+…+AN​ that you can achieve after this process?


Input Format
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT −-− the number of test cases. The description of test cases follows.


The first line of each test case contains three integers N,M,KN, M, KN,M,K.


The second line of each test case contains NNN integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.



Output Format
For each test case, output the maximum value of A1+A2+…+ANA_1 + A_2 + \ldots + A_NA1​+A2​+…+AN​ that you can achieve.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
In the first test case, one of the possible sequences of operations is the following:
First operation: Choose x=12x = 12x=12, and XOR A1,A2A_1, A_2A1​,A2​ and A3A_3A3​ with it, obtaining array [12,8,14,12][12, 8, 14, 12][12,8,14,12].
Second operation: Choose x=3x = 3x=3, and XOR A1,A2A_1, A_2A1​,A2​ and A4A_4A4​ with it, obtaining array [15,11,14,15][15, 11, 14, 15][15,11,14,15], with sum 555555.
